title: Berlin Tourist Scams - Quick Summary
items: **Berlin tourist scams are mostly pressure plus distraction.** You do not need fear; you need a few calm refusal and verification habits.
**Ignore street games, petitions and “free” gifts near tourist sights.** Keep walking, do not sign, do not bet, and do not open your wallet to prove anything.
**Crowded stations are reset points.** Before doors open or you check a map, secure phone, wallet and bag zip.
**Fake police pressure should be verified.** Real police can identify themselves; if someone wants your wallet, cash, card or PIN, step away and call 110 if unsure.

**Ticket checks, taxis and ATMs are real moments to slow down.** Ask for official ID/receipt when needed, use licensed routes, and choose euros on currency-conversion prompts unless your bank says otherwise.
